subject: SAP login issue <IMPORTANT>
description:
Hi Team,

I'm getting a 403 Forbidden error when trying to log into SAP after changing my password yesterday. The login page loads fine but after entering credentials it shows:

Error 403: Access Denied. Your account does not have permission to access this resource. Contact your system administrator.

I've tried:

  • Clearing browser cache
  • Using incognito mode
  • Different browsers (Chrome, Edge)

My old password still works for email but not SAP. I think the password sync between Entra ID and SAP might be broken.

Mei Lin Wang
Director, Financial Planning & Analysis
Contoso Financial Services

☎ +1 (212) 555-0198 | ✉ mei.wang@contoso.com

This email is confidential & intended solely for the addressee. If received in error, please delete & notify sender.

subject: Нужна помощь с Outlook / Need help with Outlook
description:
Здравствуйте, у меня проблема с Outlook. Он перестал синхронизировать после обновления.

Sorry, switching to English — my Outlook stopped syncing after the update yesterday. I get an error 0x80040115 when trying to send emails. Receiving works fine but outgoing messages stay in the Outbox forever. I'm in the Singapore office using Outlook 2024 on Windows 11. Already tried creating a new Outlook profile but same issue.

Can someone help? The Singapore IT team said to contact global support.

subject: Can’t access VDI — Error: «Session déconnectée» (was: “Re: Problème de connexion”)
description:
Hi,

I’m getting a weird error on the VDI portal. The error is in French even though my system is in English:

« Erreur: Session déconnectée. Veuillez réessayer. Code: 0xC004F074 »

Translated: “Error: Session disconnected. Please retry. Code: 0xC004F074”

I’ve been working on our London VDI for 2 years and this just started today. I need VDI access to run Bloomberg terminal — it’s the only way to access it from home. Already tried different browsers and clearing cookies.

This is my 3² report of this issue (I filed tickets last week and two weeks ago). Ticket refs: INC-4521, INC-4487.

Regards,
François Dubois
Équipe de Trading | Contoso Financial Services • London

subject: Compliance audit finding — data retention violation (LONG — full report attached inline)
description:
COMPLIANCE AUDIT REPORT
========================
Report ID: CA-2026-0342
Date: March 18, 2026
Auditor: Internal Compliance Team
Classification: CONFIDENTIAL

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
-----------------
During the quarterly data retention audit, we discovered that the email archival system (Veritas Enterprise Vault) has not been purging emails older than 7 years as required by our data retention policy (DRP-2024-v3, Section 4.2). This affects approximately 2.3TB of email data dating back to 2017.

FINDINGS
--------
1. CRITICAL: Email purge job 'EVault-AutoPurge-7Y' has been failing silently since January 2026 (10 weeks). The job runs nightly but exits with code 0 despite not deleting any records. Root cause appears to be a permissions change on the archive database.

2. HIGH: Approximately 145,000 email records from 2017-2019 should have been purged but remain in the archive. This includes emails from former employees who have been offboarded.

3. MEDIUM: The monitoring dashboard shows 'healthy' status because it only checks job exit code, not actual deletion count.

REGULATORY IMPACT
-----------------
This may constitute a violation of:
- GDPR Article 5(1)(e) — Storage limitation principle
- SEC Rule 17a-4 — Electronic record retention (though this rule requires retention, the retention beyond required period raises privacy concerns)
- Internal DRP-2024-v3 — Section 4.2 (maximum retention period)

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS
-------------------
1. Fix the EVault-AutoPurge-7Y job permissions immediately
2. Run a manual purge of records older than 7 years
3. Add deletion count validation to the monitoring dashboard
4. Notify DPO of potential GDPR exposure
5. Document remediation for audit trail

Please route this to Security Operations and Data Platform for immediate remediation. The DPO has been CC'd.

---
Compliance Team | Contoso Financial Services
This report is CONFIDENTIAL. Do not distribute outside authorized personnel.
